description: Planner proposes destination + multiple date ranges + budget in opening pitch. Group locks dates via voting. Weeks later flight prices spike, triggering destination reconsideration. Alternative destinations introduced mid-planning. Person removed by someone else. Based on real Tulum/Mexico trip text.

messages._note: 1:1 planner registration
INTRO: planner opens with name + destination
INTRO
INTRO
INTRO
INTRO
INTRO
INTRO
INTRO→COLLECTING_DESTINATIONS
OUT OF ORDER: asking about destination after it was already mentioned. Agent should reply with current destination
Planner confirms destination

messages.body: probs about three full days, maybe Nov 8-12? maybe Nov 12-16?
messages._note: DECIDING_DATES: two date ranges proposed in single message. Agent should detect both

messages.body: Nov 11th is Veterans Day so idk if people have that off also
messages._note: Contextual info about dates — not a vote
Social acknowledgment — ignore

messages.body: As long as I don't have an exam either of the dates work
messages._note: CONDITIONAL: both dates work but with caveat. Treat as flexible yes

messages.body: Okay y'all, votes are in. Nov 12-16
messages._note: Planner announces date decision — agent should lock Nov 12-16
BUDGET: planner embeds cost estimate. Agent should store and potentially skip budget poll

messages.body: I'm good w either place we might end up going to!
messages._note: FLEXIBLE VOTE: applies to all destination candidates. Don't force single choice

messages.body: Any updates on what we wanna do?
messages._note: Momentum check after silence gap

messages.body: Flight price went up like $100 for Tulum. If prices don't go down, I think it's worth considering Rico more seriously
messages._note: DESTINATION PIVOT: flight prices trigger new destination consideration. Agent should add Puerto Rico as candidate

messages.body: We can probably also do Puerto Rico if people want
messages._note: Supporting alternative destination

messages.body: we can get to dominican republic for 380
messages._note: THIRD DESTINATION: DR introduced. Agent should add as candidate
FOURTH DESTINATION: Bahamas. Should be added

messages.body: My vote is Tulum same dates bc magee and I are also planning a roommate trip that would go back to back
messages._note: VOTE WITH CONTEXT: voting for Tulum with personal reason
Status check: should show multiple destination candidates
